subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Fragrances of God! I have received thy letter... Know thou that the distinction between male and female is an exigency of the physical world
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی قرئت تحریرک مورخ ۱ ایلول سنه ۱۹۰۳ و اطلعت... و اما ما سئلت من بدء الخلق
subcodes.subjects: @second birth, @equality of men and women, @eternality vs. origination; creation from nothingness, @pairs in creation; male and female; B and E; agent and patient, @creation of the world
